subject: continuity validator capability divergence

claim_states.observed: The validators have different input contracts and non-identical invariant coverage.
claim_states.inferred: Repository-wide validation can miss duplicate relation targets and supersession cycles unless the stricter validator is composed with aggregate loading.
claim_states.proposed: Create one aggregate authoritative gate that preserves both validators' non-overlapping guarantees.
claim_states.superseded: A single undifferentiated statement that continuity relation integrity is fully enforced.
claim_states.unresolved: CI execution of a composed authoritative gate has not been observed.

verification.method: exact source readback and line-by-line capability comparison
verification.reason_runtime_tests_not_executed: The connected repository interface exposed source and commit operations but no checkout runtime in this run.

privacy_boundary: Public repository source, file paths, blob SHAs, and abstract implementation analysis only. No private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, or unreviewed uploads.
claim_boundary: Capability comparison does not prove CI execution, deployment, peer execution, or truth of indexed claims.
